title: Alphabet's investment book
question: Is Alphabet actually a skilled investor versus its peers?
finding: Best cost basis, no provable picking skill. Alphabet has the best megacap cost basis on two generational private winners (SpaceX, Anthropic; ~40–55×, +$24bn ≈ 18% of FY25 net income), but its public CapitalG/GV book shows no significant edge over a same-era IPO baseline at any horizon.
